query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360013, 'What does "Christology" specifically study?', 'multiple_choice', '["The doctrine of the church","The person and work of Christ","The doctrine of salvation","The study of angels"]', 'The person and work of Christ', 1),
(360013, 'The title "Messiah" (Mashiach) in Hebrew means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Teacher","Anointed One","Prophet","Priest"]', 'Anointed One', 2),
(360013, 'Isaiah 53 presents the Messiah as:', 'multiple_choice', '["A political conqueror","The Suffering Servant","An angelic being","A military leader"]', 'The Suffering Servant', 3),
(360013, 'The prologue of John (1:1-18) affirms:', 'multiple_choice', '["Christ''s created nature","The pre-existence and deity of the Logos","Christ as merely human","The rejection of the Old Testament"]', 'The pre-existence and deity of the Logos', 4),
(360013, 'Philippians 2:5-11 describes Christ''s:', 'multiple_choice', '["Rejection of humanity","Kenosis (self-emptying) and exaltation","Failure in his mission","Temporary divinity"]', 'Kenosis (self-emptying) and exaltation', 5),
(360013, 'The Council of Chalcedon (451 AD) affirmed:', 'multiple_choice', '["Christ has one nature only","Christ is two persons","Christ has two natures in one person","Christ is neither divine nor human"]', 'Christ has two natures in one person', 6),
(360013, 'The Greek term homoousios means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Similar substance","Of the same substance","Different substance","Created substance"]', 'Of the same substance', 7),
(360013, 'Hebrews 4:15 teaches that Christ:', 'multiple_choice', '["Sinned like all humans","Was tempted yet without sin","Could not be tempted","Avoided all human experience"]', 'Was tempted yet without sin', 8),
(360013, 'The threefold office of Christ includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Teacher, healer, miracle worker","Prophet, priest, and king","Apostle, evangelist, pastor","Father, Son, Spirit"]', 'Prophet, priest, and king', 9),
(360013, 'Why is the hypostatic union essential for salvation?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is merely a theological technicality","Only a divine-human mediator can reconcile God and humanity","It has no practical significance","It was invented by later councils"]', 'Only a divine-human mediator can reconcile God and humanity', 10),
(360013, 'Explain how the Chalcedonian Definition safeguards both the deity and humanity of Christ and why this matters for the gospel.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Chalcedonian Definition affirms Christ is truly God and truly man without confusion, change, division, or separation', 11);

(360013, 'Explain how the Chalcedonian Definition safeguards both the deity and humanity of Christ and why this matters for the gospel.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Chalcedonian Definition affirms Christ is truly God and truly man without confusion, change, division, or separation', 11);
